dict.string: metid needs access to network volumes so it can read and write metadata on files stored on NAS or other shared drives.
metid needs access to removable volumes so it can read and write metadata on files stored on external drives and memory cards.
metid needs access to your Desktop to read and write metadata on files you open from there.
metid needs access to your Documents folder to read and write metadata on files you open from there.
metid needs access to your Downloads folder to read and write metadata on files you open from there.
